title: Fire | Fyre-side Chat
description: Speakers: Lauren Mignott (CEO & Co-Founder, The Maison Projects); Lauren Austin (Chief Creative Officer, MKG); Ben Smith (Executive Creative Director, The Mayda Creative Co.); Tara Reilly (SVP Experiential & Partnerships, Vox Media). Every creative career has three defining projects: the one that worked, the one that didn't, and the one that changed everything. A candid conversation about the wins, failures, lessons, and unexpected moments that shaped the work — with Laura Mignott keeping the stories honest.

title: Experiential As The Answer
description: Speakers: Bryan Buckley (Filmmaker, Screenwriter, Producer, Hungryman Productions); Erica Boeke (Founder & CEO, XP Land); Jimmy Knowles (Global Head of Experiential, Canva). As audiences become harder to reach and easier to ignore, experiences are emerging as a powerful way to build connection, culture, and lasting brand impact. A conversation on why experiential is having a defining moment — and where it's headed next.

title: Experiential As The Epicenter
description: Speakers: JL Pomeroy (Founder, BRIDGELINE); Jeffrey LeFrancois (President, Meatpacking District Management Association); Shannon Jones (Co-Founder, VERB); Yadira Harrison (Co-Founder, VERB); Brown Bartholomew (CEO + Co-Founder, CAPE). Experiential has moved from the sidelines to the center of culture. Through four fast-paced talks, hear from the creators, placemakers, and storytellers redefining how brands, communities, and audiences connect through unforgettable experiences.

title: For You Page: From the People that Built it, Backed It, and Connected It
description: Speakers: Keiko Mori (Head of Creative Product Marketing & Ops NA, TikTok); Billy Bohan Chinique (VP Marketing & Digital Innovation, Virgin Voyages); Tameka Bazile (B2B Social & Content Marketing, Business Insider); Morgan Jay (Musician & Comedian). Platform and content leaders cut through the noise to reveal what actually works: not technical tricks, but understanding human behavior. The most effective content delivers real value — not algorithms.

title: Made to Matter: How The Best Brands Create and Connect in an AI World
description: Speakers: Cliff Obrecht (Co-Founder & COO, Canva); Bill Magnuson (Co-Founder & CEO, Braze); Stephanie Mehta (CEO & Chief Content Officer, Mansueto Ventures). As AI transforms content creation and distribution, the marketers who win won't just move faster, they'll think differently. Hear how two founders shaping the future of creativity protect their brand identity and make sure it stands out in a world drowning in content.

title: Close the Loop: How the Best Creative Teams Use Canva Grow to Create, Launch, and Learn
description: Speakers: George Howes (Head of Canva Grow, Canva); Brian Kearney (VP of Growth, International, AG1); Cliff Obrecht (Co-Founder & COO, Canva). What if your next campaign could go from idea to live ad and continuously improve itself, all in one workflow? A Canva Grow preview of the marketing platform that connects creative, publishing, and performance, so teams can launch faster, learn what works, and scale winning campaigns.

title: Build a Bold Brand in a Sea of Sameness
description: Speakers: Meghan Gendelman (B2B Chief Marketing Officer, Canva); Jamie Heller (Editor-in-Chief, Business Insider); Kimberly Storin (Chief Marketing Officer, Zoom). When everyone has access to the same AI tools, standing out becomes the real challenge. Hear how iconic brands protect originality, take creative risks, and stay distinctive in an increasingly homogeneous market.

title: Pride on the Croisette
description: Colour, creativity, and a beat you won't see coming. Join us Thursday evening to celebrate Pride on the Croisette — drag queens, a disco ball, and a whole lot of life. (Party, 8pm–11pm.)
